word: H5562 - סַמְגַּר נְבֹו - Çamgar Nᵉbôw - sam-gar' neb-o' - Samgar-nebo

sections.paragraph:
Original: סמגּר נבו

Transliteration: samgar nebô

Phonetic: sam-gar' neb-o'

BDB Definition:

Samgar-nebo = "sword of Nebo"
  1. one of the princes or generals of king Nebuchadnezzar of Babylon

Origin: of foreign origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
